# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re
import lib.ansible.modules.cloud.docker.docker_image_info

def test_documentation_markup_uses_C_not_O_for_pull_source__a1():
    """
    The module DOCUMENTATION should use Ansible doc markup C(...) for literal values.
    The reviewed typo was O(pull) which should be C(pull).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/modules/cloud/docker/docker_image_info.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'O(pull)' not in source, "Found typo 'O(pull)' in docker_image_info DOCUMENTATION; expected it to be fixed to 'C(pull)'."

def test_documentation_markup_uses_C_not_O_for_pull_source__a2():
    """
    The module DOCUMENTATION should use Ansible doc markup C(...) for literal values.
    The reviewed typo was O(pull) which should be C(pull).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/modules/cloud/docker/docker_image_info.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'C(pull)' in source, "Expected corrected documentation markup 'C(pull)' to be present in docker_image_info DOCUMENTATION."

def test_documentation_markup_uses_C_not_O_for_pull_source__a3():
    """
    The module DOCUMENTATION should use Ansible doc markup C(...) for literal values.
    The reviewed typo was O(pull) which should be C(pull).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/modules/cloud/docker/docker_image_info.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    doc_line_match = re.search('set to (O|C)\\(pull\\)', source)
    assert doc_line_match, "Expected to find documentation text containing 'set to C(pull)' in the module source."

def test_documentation_markup_uses_C_not_O_for_pull_source__a4():
    """
    The module DOCUMENTATION should use Ansible doc markup C(...) for literal values.
    The reviewed typo was O(pull) which should be C(pull).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/lib/ansible/modules/cloud/docker/docker_image_info.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    doc_line_match = re.search('set to (O|C)\\(pull\\)', source)
    assert doc_line_match.group(1) == 'C', "Expected the documentation sentence to say 'set to C(pull)' (code formatting), not 'O(pull)'."
